settings.content: Logos used for header and the footer of the site. We recommend using the brand metadata for the store to be consistent across themes and content.
The font used across the entire store, changing this will affect all text used for headers and body content.
The font used across the entire store, changing this will affect all text used for headers and body content.
Allow multiple links, each link in a new line. Please upload to [Shopify files](/admin/settings/files) and paste link here. These formats TTF, OTF, WOFF & WOFF2 are supported.

The content that each section is wrapped around, this will make the elements more drawn in if required.
This will primarily affect page animations, the element will attach dynamically and reveal on scroll for a nicer load effect!
Used for hover events on product cards and collection cards
Used to affect any <button> classes used across the site, an easy way to style and keep buttons consistent
